title: Offices of All Other Miscellaneous Health Practitioners

labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 621399 ($9,673,437,477) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 621399 ($19,100,045,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

n_band.derivation: margin 0.1580 (margins.json[62]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Hospitals/Healthcare Facilities EBITDA/Sales 15.80% (closest named bucket for provider economics; public support-services bucket at 3.87% reflects a different business model)); revenue/employee $152,113 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 621399); class <5: 24,879 firms, avg revenue/firm $248,362 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $39,241 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 3,071 firms, avg revenue/firm $831,844 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $131,431 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 1,436 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,672,111 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $264,193 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 784 firms, avg revenue/firm $3,640,608 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $575,216 -> out of $1-10M band; class 100-499: 160 firms, avg revenue/firm $9,748,212 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $1,540,218 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 124 firms, avg revenue/firm $28,639,952 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $4,525,112 -> IN $1-10M band; n_band = 284
n_band.margin_source: Damodaran Jan 2026: Hospitals/Healthcare Facilities EBITDA/Sales 15.80% (closest named bucket for provider economics; public support-services bucket at 3.87% reflects a different business model)
